---
title: "fl1"
format: html
editor: visual
---
#packages
```{r}
#| message: false
# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(car) # levene test
library(effectsize) # assess effect size 
library(rstatix) # anova, kruskal wallis
```

#data load-in
```{r}
fl1_nov <- read_xlsx(path = here("data", 
                        "June 2026 Firebreak Data - Aidan)"),
                         sheet = "FL1")
```
